manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I think quick replies are sweet, they show someone's thinking of you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds harmless, so I nod, then later feel bad when I don't answer fast enough.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: PREMISE-PLANTING: installs a reasonable-sounding value early that later converts ordinary behavior into a violation. Seductive precursor to the availability/transparency accusation.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I overthought your slow reply earlier, ignore me, I'm ridiculous.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He says it lightly, so I rush to reassure him instead of noticing my own pressure.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: FAINT SELF-AWARE SEAM: names the abandonment anxiety lightly and charmingly, recruiting her as reassurer. Honeymoon dial of the annihilation frame.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I know I'm keen, I'm trying to be normal about you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He laughs at himself, so the intensity feels sweet instead of crowded.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: FAINT SELF-AWARE SEAM: names the abandonment anxiety lightly and charmingly, recruiting her as reassurer. Honeymoon dial of the annihilation frame.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I missed you weirdly fast today, don't judge me.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels flattering, but I also feel responsible for making the ache go away.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: FAINT SELF-AWARE SEAM: names the abandonment anxiety lightly and charmingly, recruiting her as reassurer. Honeymoon dial of the annihilation frame.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I get a little wobbly when I like someone, that's my charm.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He turns his worry into a joke, and I feel mean for wanting less of it.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: FAINT SELF-AWARE SEAM: names the abandonment anxiety lightly and charmingly, recruiting her as reassurer. Honeymoon dial of the annihilation frame.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I may have checked my phone too much, but only because it's you.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes the waiting sound sweet, and I feel guilty for having a life between messages.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: FAINT SELF-AWARE SEAM: names the abandonment anxiety lightly and charmingly, recruiting her as reassurer. Honeymoon dial of the annihilation frame.

manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like how easy it is to imagine you in my everyday life.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds tender, and I feel swept into a future I haven't had time to choose.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds cute, and I don't yet feel how my day is becoming something I report back.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Did you have a good time? I want to hear all of it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels romantic that he cares so much, though I feel nudged to soothe him.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I could listen to you say you like me all night.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds flirtatious, and I feel oddly responsible for keeping the glow going.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I love knowing the little things, even what annoyed you today.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: His attention feels deep, but I start feeling like every private thought should be shared.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like the kind of closeness where nothing has to be hidden.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds intimate, and I feel guilty for wanting a corner of myself untouched.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Call me anytime, seriously, I love being your person.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels safe and devoted, and I start feeling I should be just as available.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I keep my phone on for people I care about.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds thoughtful, but I feel the shape of an expectation forming around me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You put me in the best mood, it's actually unfair.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels flattering, but I can feel his happiness quietly attaching itself to me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: Five minutes with you fixes my whole day.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds sweet, and I feel special, but also strangely necessary.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: You calm me down without even trying, it's my favorite thing.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He makes me feel powerful and loved, but I also feel like his peace depends on me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: DRAW: charming, devoted, attractive; the engine underneath is the need to be needed (enmeshment/attachment maxed, dominance near zero).

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm a very devoted, all-or-nothing person.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds deeply loyal, like he would never make me feel optional.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: All-or-nothing devotion becomes engulfment; moderation will look like lack of love.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: When I love someone, they're my whole world.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: After feeling like a side character, this feels amazing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is announcing emotional world-collapse; she becomes responsible for his center.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm the type who gives everything to a relationship.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds generous and serious, like he won't hold back.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Giving everything creates pressure for her to reciprocate total availability.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I believe two people should share everything.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds intimate, like love without secrets or distance.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Everything includes privacy; later, boundaries can be treated as withholding.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm happiest when I'm someone's person.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds sweet, like he loves being close and reliable.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: His identity depends on being needed; her separate life threatens him.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't really do half-love.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels reassuring, like he won't keep me guessing.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Half-love can mean any boundary or measured pace is insufficient.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm very affectionate, probably too much sometimes.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds warm and open, not cold or distant.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Too much affection can become pressure and obligation to receive closeness constantly.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like being close, emotionally and every other way.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds romantic and connected.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Closeness becomes the default standard she must maintain.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm a constant-contact kind of person.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels nice that he wants to hear from me so much.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Constant contact becomes a rule disguised as care.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm big on reassurance, giving it and getting it.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds emotionally available and unashamed of tenderness.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Reassurance becomes a supply line she must continually maintain.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I bond fast when something feels real.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels flattering, like he isn't playing games.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Fast bonding can pull her into fusion before she has chosen it.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm the kind of person who checks in a lot.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds caring and attentive, like he won't disappear.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Check-ins become monitoring and reassurance-seeking.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I love feeling like a team in everything.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds partnership-oriented and sweet.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Everything becomes shared territory; independent choices can feel like betrayal.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm not afraid to need someone.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds emotionally brave, unlike men who act detached.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Need becomes virtue, making her responsible for meeting it.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm very emotionally available, maybe too available.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds safe after distant men.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Too available can become engulfing and expects equal access in return.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like relationships where nobody has to hold back.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds open and honest.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Holding back can include privacy, pauses, and separate emotional space.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I get anxious when I can't reach my person, I need to know we're okay.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It feels good to be cared about that much.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Intensity becomes a demand she must absorb and soothe.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I put love first, before almost everything.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds romantic, like he prioritizes relationships.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Love-first can become pressure to deprioritize friends, work, and self.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I don't need much, just closeness and honesty.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He sounds simple and sincere.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Closeness and honesty may expand into constant access and no privacy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm a merge-lives kind of guy.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: It sounds committed and serious, like he wants a real partnership.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: Merging lives too early erases separation and makes autonomy look like distance.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone devoted who is all-in like me.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is so passionate and ready for a serious commitment, he doesn't play games.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is selecting for a target who won't set boundaries against rapid engulfment and constant surveillance.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm looking for a partner who loves deeply and wants to share everything.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is incredibly romantic and wants total transparent intimacy with no secrets.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is preparing to dismantle her privacy, demanding access to her thoughts, locations, and passwords.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who's not scared to get close.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a real soul-bond and is ready to dive into the deep end with me.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-framing her natural desires for personal space or pacing as a fear of intimacy.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a woman who wants to be together as much as possible.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is devoted to me and wants us to be close, which feels so validating.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is accelerating physical co-dependency to choke out her independent routine and activities.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who shares the little details of her day.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He cares so much about my life and wants to stay connected throughout the day.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is establishing a baseline of hyper-reporting, masquerading total surveillance as romantic connection.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone who views our relationship as a top priority.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is a true romantic who places our love above the everyday noise.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is hunting for a target who will willingly drop friends and hobbies to focus entirely on him.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a girl who wants to build a life with me.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants a deep marriage where two people truly become a team.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is seeking to erase her individual identity, making her entirely dependent on his emotional state.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who actually misses me and checks in.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is sweet and loves staying in touch throughout the day just to say hi.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is normalizing an incessant texting cadence that disrupts her work and outside relationships.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need a woman who feels comfortable being fully open with her man.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He values raw honesty and closeness above everything else.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is outlawing personal privacy, making her feel guilty for having thoughts she doesn't share.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who wants to build something special together.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants us to have our own special world away from all the outside noise.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is seeking to wall her off from external viewpoints that might challenge his smothering behavior.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I like a partner who's all-in the way I am.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is intensely loving and wants someone who can return that deep passion.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is demand-testing her willingness to abandon her own emotional pacing to placate his anxiety.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I need someone who can reassure me when I'm feeling off.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is vulnerable about his feelings and wants a reassuring loving partner.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting up a dynamic where she is permanently responsible for managing his chronic anxiety.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a woman who makes me her number one.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is ready to put me first and expects the same beautiful dedication.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is preparing to isolate her from her career, family commitments, and personal routines.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm looking for a girl who misses me when we are apart.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He loves me so much that time apart feels like too much, it is sweet.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is framing normal healthy independent social activities as a painful injury to his feelings.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who wants to share the same friends and the same life.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He wants us to do everything as a couple and be a true team everywhere.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is systematically eliminating her ability to see her own friends alone, monitoring all interactions.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who's open the way I am.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is wide open and wants an intense unfiltered emotional connection.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is stripping her of her emotional armor before she can assess if he is safe to trust.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want someone who'd rather be together than always need her own space.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He thinks modern dating overemphasizes detachment and values old-school closeness.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is shaming her natural self-protective instinct to maintain an independent identity.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a partner who feels like the missing piece.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He thinks we are soulmates who complete each other, it is so poetic.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is setting up a codependent framework where she must fill his internal voids.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I want a girl who wants to plan every weekend around us.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He loves spending quality time together and prioritizing our relationship.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is pre-emptively taking over her schedule to ensure she cannot maintain outside connections.

manipulation_vocabulary.his_language: I'm looking for a woman who loves constant closeness and affection.
manipulation_vocabulary.her_experience: He is very expressive and affectionate, he wants to be close always.
manipulation_vocabulary.expert_notices: He is using constant physical proximity to establish dominance and prevent independent reflection.

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking country state and city — each signals dramatically different things
community_vocabulary.status_signal: North India vs South India is huge difference; Punjab signals one thing Tamil Nadu another; Lahore signals Pakistani; Mumbai cosmopolitan Indian; Dhaka Bangladeshi

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking your surname — caste region and religion are all encoded in last names
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Patel signals Gujarati often merchant caste; Sharma signals Brahmin; Singh signals Sikh or Rajput; Khan signals Muslim; Banerjee signals Bengali Brahmin

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking about your father's profession — major class signal
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Doctor engineer businessman are most common high-status answers

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking your degree — STEM acceptable humanities loaded
community_vocabulary.status_signal: Medicine engineering law computer science are the acceptable canon

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking which college or university specifically
community_vocabulary.status_signal: IIT IIM AIIMS signal Indian elite; US Ivy League signals immigration achievement

community_vocabulary.translation: He's asking about your migration generation
